title: alsine crispa
intro: Alsine crispa, also known as Alsine, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Alsine crispa include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of Alsine crispa are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a tea or used in the form of a tincture or infusion.
